raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch irr muhſ us ſcho
Weetu weddis/ un irr mums ſcho
Semmi/ kaſ ar Peenu un Med-
du teſſ/dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu redſ/ eß eſmu to
Semmes Augtu Pirmajus at-
neſſis/ fo tas KUNGS man de-
wis irr/ tad buhſ tew tohs atſtaht
preekſch ta KUNGA tawa Dee-
wa/un te KUNGU tawu Deewu
peeluhgt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhſ preezatees
pahr wiſſu to Labbumu / fo tas
KUNGŠ tew un tawain Nam-
mam dewis irr/ tew un tawain Le-
witam / un tawain Swetchinee-
kam/ kaſ tawa Widdu irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tu pabeigſti to definitu
Teeſu doht no wiſſeem tawu Au_
gtu Definiteem treschâ Gaddâ/
tas to Definitu Gadß irr / tad
dohd tam Lewitam / tam Swe-
chineekam/ tam Bahrixam/ un
tai Atraitnei/ka tee tawas Wahr-
tis ehd / un pee_ehd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhſ preekſch ta
KUNGA tawa Deewa Waiga
fazziht : Eß eſmu to/ kaſ fweh-
tihts no ta Namma iſneſſis / un
eſmu arridsan dewis tam Lewi-
tam / un taw Sweschineekam/
tam Bahrixam/ un tai Atrait-
nei pehz wiſſahn tawahm Pa-
wehleſchanahin / fo tu man pa-
wehlejs eſſi/ eß ne eſmu pahrkah-
pis nedß aismirtis tawas Pawch-
lefchanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eß ne eſmu no ta ehdi
mannâ Noſkumschanaâ / un ne ef-
mu no ta fo atrahwis par Ap
gahnischannu / eß arrt ne eſmu na
ta preekſch rahda Mixrona de
wis / eß eſmu tai Balksnei te
KUNGA manna Deciva klau
tijs/ eß eſmu darrijs pehz wiſſu
fo tu man eſſi pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Skattajs wirß Semme
no tawas Sivehtibas Weetas
no tahß Debbes/un fwehti tawu
Laudis to Israēlu/un to Semmi/
fo tu mums dewis eſſi / ittin fo
tu muhſeem Tehweem eſſi fweh-
rejs/ weenü Semmi/ kaſ ar Pee-
nu un Meddu teſſ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schinni Deenaâ paweh-
tas KUNGS taws Deews teu
ſchohs Likkumus/ un fchahs Tee-
tas darriht/ tad nu turri un dar-
ri tahß no wiſſas tawas Sirde/
un no wiſſas tawas Dwehfe-
les.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schodeen eſſi tu tam
KUNGAM fazzijs: ka wiſſam
buhſ tew par Deewu buht / un
ka tu wiſſßs winna Zeltßs grih-
bi ſtaigaht / un turreht winna
Likkumue/ un winna Banflus/
un winna Teefas / un winna
Balksnei klaufiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS irr tew
ſchodeen fazzijs : ka tew winnam
buhſ par ihpaſcheein Laudim
buht/ittin ka wiſſch tew irr run-
najs / un ka tu wiſſus winna
Banflus grihbi turreht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka wiſſch teiv pahr wiſ-
fahm Tautahm/ fo wiſſch darrijs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
